goal: Connect the existing S58 G3B-U08 semantic authority and production runtime to the post-Golden shared adapter without changing its six KnowledgePoints, six PatternGroups, twenty-four PatternSpecs, semantic templates, validator, renderer or public behavior.

authorityLineage.producer: S58C semantic PatternSpec registry plus S58F/S58H promotion overlays
authorityLineage.authoritativeState: six semantic KnowledgePoints, six PatternGroups and twenty-four PatternSpecs
authorityLineage.runtimeConsumer: existing G3B-U08 canonical semantic router, semantic generator, blocking validator and S58H renderer
authorityLineage.readback: POSTG focused shadow generation and validation
